title: Improving storage efficiency in Magic Pocket, our immutable blob store
description: By turning compaction into a layered, adaptive pipeline and strengthening our monitoring and controls, we made Magic Pocket more resilient to workload changes.

title: Reducing our monorepo size to improve developer velocity
description: Monorepos will continue to grow as products evolve, but growth doesn’t have to mean friction.

title: How we optimized Dash's relevance judge with DSPy
description: We used DSPy to turn prompt engineering for our relevance judge into a measurable, automated optimization loop, improving task performance, cost, and how reliably it works in production.

title: Using LLMs to amplify human labeling and improve Dash search relevance
description: How we train Dash's search ranking models with a mix of human and LLM-assisted labeling.

title: How low-bit inference enables efficient AI
description: Making products like Dropbox Dash accessible to individuals and businesses means tackling new challenges around efficiency and resource use.

title: Insights from our executive roundtable on AI and engineering productivity

title: Engineering VP Josh Clemm on how we use knowledge graphs, MCP, and DSPy in Dash
description: Engineering VP Josh Clemm deep-dives into how we think about knowledge graphs, indexes, MCP, and prompt optimization using tools like DSPy.

title: Inside the feature store powering real-time AI in Dropbox Dash
description: The feature store is a critical part of how we rank and retrieve the right context across your work.

title: Building the future: highlights from Dropbox’s 2025 summer intern class
description: The Dropbox Intern Program is thoughtfully designed to cultivate growth, spark innovation, and build lasting connections.

title: How Dash uses context engineering for smarter AI
description: Building effective, agentic AI isn’t just about adding more; it’s about helping the model focus on what matters most.
